subject: Hotel Details Page Needs Airbnb Redesign (TASK-009)
context_summary: The room detail page (/room/{slug}/{id}) has been fully redesigned to Airbnb-style in this session. The hotel detail page (/hotel/{slug}/{id}) still uses the OLD layout and needs the same treatment.

problems: Uses circular <figure class='hotel_img'> logo instead of large gallery
Shows counter boxes (ul.hotel-info_list) instead of clean specs row
Room carousel uses old product-default card style
Review section uses old progress bars format

required_sections: Title row with Share/Save buttons (same as room-details)
5-photo hotel gallery or single large hero image
Available Perahu (rooms) carousel — keep existing swiper but restyle cards
Reviews in 2-col grid (same pattern as room-details)

available: $hotel (with: title, description, stars, latitude, longitude, logo, average_rating, address)
important_notes: $hotel->categoryName and $hotel->categorySlug are available from HotelController joins

css_instructions.approach: Append new classes to end of style.css

verification_steps: Verify: no breadcrumb, large image/gallery, 2-col layout, reviews in grid
